subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Withhold not Thy loved ones from the ocean of Thy bounty, and deprive them not of the wondrous tokens of Thy generosity which are with Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی لاتمنع اولیائک عن بحر فضلک و لا تخیبهم عما عندک من بدایع جودک
subcodes.subjects: @power of love, @business; financial; property matters, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement
